title: Arctic's More Flowers
description:
A mod made to help builders create a more colourful world with some stuff for people to survival.

In AMF you can cut off flower heads and use them for dye crafting, you can also grow them back with a dye bottle full of water.
body:
A mod made to help builders create a more colourful world with some stuff for people to survival.

In AMF you can cut off flower heads and use them for dye crafting, you can also grow them back with a dye bottle full of water.

With the dye bottles, you can fill them with dye and create a world of colour with any flower with any colour of your choice (Except brown because it looks like you forgot to water them).

There is also the Florest Table which unlocks the new florest villager, they can trade rare flowers that may help you in a survival setting.
